title: The Directory That Answered
description:
Tunde drops three log files on the desk. 'The Griot did not guess the admin path. They ran a scan and the server answered. Everything you need to understand about what was exposed is in these logs. The interesting line is not where you expect it — read all three tabs.'

Amaka: 'The HTTP access log runs over five hundred lines. Most of it is noise from legitimate users. Pay attention to the source address, the timestamps, and what the server returned.'

widgetConfig.instructions: Three log tabs. The flag is in one of them — buried. Read carefully.
